title: Apple and Cucumber Salad
description: A crisp, refreshing salad of thinly sliced apple and cucumber with fresh herbs and a light apple cider vinaigrette. Toss right before serving.

ingredients.name: crisp apples (Honeycrisp or similar), thinly sliced or cut into matchsticks
English cucumber, halved lengthwise and thinly sliced
apple cider or white wine vinegar

instructions.text: Whisk or shake together olive oil, vinegar, Dijon, honey, salt, and pepper until emulsified.
Slice apples thin or cut into matchsticks. Halve cucumber lengthwise and slice thin. Slice red onion. Chop parsley or mint.
Combine apples, cucumber, red onion, and herbs in a large bowl. Toss lightly with vinaigrette right before serving so it stays crisp.

notes:
Dress right before serving — the vinaigrette softens both the apple and cucumber quickly.

Only peel the cucumber if it's a waxed variety. English cucumbers don't need peeling.
